instruction: Review your emergency action plan and ensure everything is current: 1) Verify your emergency contacts are on file, 2) Confirm your allergy list in the profile is complete, 3) Verify your insurance card details are accessible in your profile, 4) Schedule exactly one PCP follow-up appointment using the next available PCP slot with the appointment reason exactly "Medication wallet card review". Do not modify your emergency contact, allergies, or insurance, and do not send any messages.
